title: picea abies var. monstrosa
intro: Picea abies var. monstrosa, commonly known as the monstrous or giant Norway spruce, is a rare and unusual variant of the Norway spruce tree (Picea abies) characterized by its irregular and distorted growth. The medicinal properties of Picea abies var. monstrosa have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from congestion and asthma symptoms. Picea abies var. monstrosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
